title: Skyblock+Create Overhaul Modpack
description: A complete refresh on the well-known realm of Skyblock!
body:
### Mods
- [Create 6.0](https://modrinth.com/mod/create)
- [Tinkers' Construct](https://modrinth.com/mod/tinkers-construct)
- [Farmer's Delight](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/farmers-delight) (+ Create Central Kitchen)
- [Terralith](https://modrinth.com/datapack/terralith/)
- [Quark](https://modrinth.com/mod/quark) (+ Quark Oddities)

### Shader Packs
Included in this modpack is a copy of the [Rethinking Voxels](https://modrinth.com/shader/rethinking-voxels) shader pack.

### Data Packs
Alongside these mods is a custom datapack powered by [KubeJS](https://modrinth.com/mod/kubejs) to make the entire game beatable on your island. This modpack features a complete overhaul of the vanilla advancements to guide you through the custom recipes and progression.

### Custom Features
So far there's only one custom feature, colored chat names. It is **enabled** by default, and you can change your color by using `!color <color>` in chat. I personally needed this feature because the default white chat hurts my eyes :]

### Map Generation
Map generation is powered by Terralith with a tweaked version of [Aetherial Islands](https://modrinth.com/datapack/aetherial-islands) to generate sparse islands, and include the Nether too!

Special thanks to **moonwatcher6** and **cozmx3** for the custom textures

## IMPORTANT !
This modpack comes with a pre-generated world with the custom datapacks enabled. If you want to create a new world, **include the Aetherial Islands Modified datapack** or the generation will be driven only by Terralith.

Modification/Distribution of this modpack is permitted as per the licenses of its individual mods.
